name: project-memory
description: Automatic repository-first context, planning, handoff, and governed history for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Automatic project context and agent handoffs.
interface.longDescription: Initializes and maintains repository-first project memory so agents can resume work with accepted context, bounded tasks, evidence, and append-only history.
defaultPrompt: Initialize Project Memory before we begin.
Resume this project from its accepted context.
Prepare a governed handoff for the next agent.
